violations.text: An open employees' beverage container was observed stored in a food preparation area. Employees shall not drink from open beverage containers in order to prevent contamination of their hands, the container, and exposed food.PIC informed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC moved to warewashing to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of (PIC), (Chicken Wings) was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep.PIC informed of proper cooling methods.PIC placed chicken in shallow pans. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025

Working containers of (dry ingredients) are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025

The concentration of the sanitizer solution for the wet wiping cloths was (0 ) parts per million (ppm). The required concentration for (chlorine) sanitizer is (50-100 ) ppm. PIC added bleach for proper concentration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of (dry ingredients). Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of food debris, soil residue, and/or other debris: 1.Prep table shelves 2.All refrigeration units 3.Metal shelves over 3 bay sink 4.Sauces and dry ingredients table 5.food storage shelves New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (side storage area) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025

(Fried Rice), which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

Working containers of (dry ingredients ) are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025
